name: Thumbs Up Feeds Me
overview: A web drama that delves into the daily office life of content PDs and interns at Lululala. Follow their journey as they tackle creative challenges, navigate office politics, and forge meaningful relationships. From brainstorming sessions to tight deadlines, this series offers a humorous and heartfelt look at the ups and downs of working in a dynamic content production company. Watch as friendships form, romances bloom, and careers are made in this engaging portrayal of modern office life.

trailers.title: 내가 좋아하는 사람이 다른 사람을 좋아한다ㅣ웹드라마 [좋아요가 밥 먹여줍니다] 스페셜
